message.content:
@startuml
title Beregning af BMI

actor bruger
participant "index.jsp" as index
participant "resultat.jsp" as resultat

box "BmiUtil"
participant Initializer
end box

box "PresentationLayer"
participant FrontController
participant Command
participant Resultat
end box

box "LogicFacade"
participant LogicFacade
end box

box "DBAccess"
participant BmiMapper
end box

database BmiDB

bruger -> index : 1 start

== Initialization ==

index -> Initializer : 2 getSportList()
Initializer --> index : 3 ArrayList<Sport>

== Beregn BMI ==

index -> FrontController : 4 doPost()
FrontController -> FrontController : 5 processRequest()
FrontController -> Command : 6 from()
Command --> FrontController : 7 Resultat
FrontController -> Command : 8 execute()
Command -> LogicFacade : 9 insertBmiItem()
LogicFacade -> BmiMapper : 10 insertBmiItem()
BmiMapper -> BmiDB : 11 executeQuery()
BmiDB --> BmiMapper : 12 OK
BmiMapper --> LogicFacade : 13 OK
LogicFacade --> Command : 14 OK
Command --> FrontController : 15 resultat
FrontController --> resultat : 16 forward()

@enduml
